message:
chore(gitignore): exclude playwright-report directory

Add playwright-report/ to gitignore to prevent Playwright test report
HTML files from being tracked. These are generated test artifacts that
are machine-specific and can be regenerated on demand.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,3 +54,6 @@ test-results/
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
 .env*.local
+
+# Playwright test artifacts
+playwright-report/
